title: Brassburg Mod
description: This mod aims to improve the gameplay on Brassburg SMP by adding custom items.
body:
## What is this mod?
This mod is a collection of items with custom textures that have been created for use within modpacks, with the help of datapacks or mods such as KubeJS, crafting recipies can be added for these items to survival friendly play. 

This mod is not recomended for standard singleplayer play, as the items are otherwise unobtainable, its intended use is for server administrators to have these items be used as part of the running of the server. 

### Mod Contents:
- 3 tokens; Brass, Copper, Zinc.
- Exchanger block, with custom model and textures. Exchanges Brass Token for Capsule.
- Loot Capsule that drops random music discs from the mod.  
- 5 Custom Music Discs with music made with SunoAI
- 12 New paintings made by players of the Brassburg SMP server.
